source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped cardiac, neurological, syncope, severe-headache, weakness, and persistent-vomiting warning fields.

added_items.final_wording: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness
